name: Pokémon TCG: Mega Greninja ex Premium Collection
shortDescription: Take Mega Greninja ex into battle with an exclusive promotional card, an oversized lenticular card, a reusable tech sticker and eight Pokémon TCG booster packs.
fullDescription:
Mega Greninja ex flips the battle upside down in this premium Pokémon TCG collection.

The collection includes Mega Greninja ex in both playable and oversized display formats, alongside a reusable tech sticker and eight Pokémon TCG booster packs. It is a strong choice for collectors, players and Mega Greninja fans looking for a premium sealed Pokémon TCG release.
contents: 1 foil promo card featuring Mega Greninja ex
1 oversized lenticular promo card featuring Mega Greninja ex
variationNotice: Booster-pack artwork and assortment may vary.

seo.title: Pokémon TCG Mega Greninja ex Premium Collection | TCG Hobby
seo.description: Shop the Pokémon TCG Mega Greninja ex Premium Collection for £49.99, including exclusive Mega Greninja ex promotional cards, a tech sticker and eight booster packs. Free UK standard delivery. Limit one per household.
